title: iguanura thalangensis
intro: Iguanura thalangensis is a species of bamboo-like palm, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia, and is also known as the Thai bamboo palm or Thai wild bamboo. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Iguanura thalangensis include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the rhizomes and leaves of Iguanura thalangensis are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
